song.title: How Sweet How Heavenly is the Sight
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) How sweet, how heav’nly is the sight, When those who love the Lord In one another’s peace delight, And so fulfill His Word.
[V2] 2) When each can feel his brother’s sigh, And with him bear a part; When sorrow flows from eye to eye, And joy from heart to heart.
[V3] 3) When, free from envy, scorn and pride, Our wishes all above, Each can his brother’s failings hide, And show a brother’s love.
[V4] 4) When love, in one delightful stream, Through every bosom flows; When union sweet, and dear esteem, In every action glows.
[V5] 5) Love is the golden chain that binds; The saints Thy grace thus prove. And he is glory’s heir that finds His bosom glow with love.
song.author: Joseph Swain
